text:

    "thinking": "I am identifying the initial state of the screen at the start of the recording. The page is 'Askable Sessions' and displays a message instructing the user to share their screen. A small video feed of the participant is visible in the top right corner.",

    "time_start_ms": 0,

    "description": "Initial screen state: Askable Sessions landing page with a dark background and a message about screen sharing. A small video feed of the participant is in the top right.",

  },
  {
    "thinking": "The system begins to type out the task description on the screen. This is a visible UI state change as content is being rendered dynamically.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 2250,
    "time_end_ms": 31200,
    "description": "The first part of the task description is typed out on the screen: 'Perfect! Here's your task: Imagine you need to book a return domestic flight within Australia for an upcoming trip. Using the Flight Centre website, search for flights, select your preferred options, and proceed through the booking flow including reviewing any ancillaries and seat selection.'",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "page_title": "Askable Sessions",
    "page_location": "https://sessions.askable.com/a/-mod/69fcd43bd82edc4df44ae3c",
    "frame_description": "Text is appearing on the dark background of the Askable Sessions page."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The system continues typing the second part of the task instructions after clearing the previous text.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 31200,
    "time_end_ms": 46200,
    "description": "The second part of the task description is typed out: 'Please think out loud as you go — share what you're looking at, what you're thinking, and any reactions you have. You can stop once you reach the page asking for traveller details (you don't need to enter any personal information or complete the actual purchase).'",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "page_title": "Askable Sessions",
    "page_location": "https://sessions.askable.com/a/-mod/69fcd43bd82edc4df44ae3c",
    "frame_description": "The second block of instruction text is being rendered on the screen."
  },
  {

    "frame_description": "A button labeled 'Open' is now visible at the bottom of the text area."
